title: Implement integration tests for F1 data flow (end-to-end validation)

steps.description: Set up test containers for F1's required secondary adapters (SQLite for persistence, RabbitMQ for messaging)
steps.done_condition: Containers run successfully in test environment

steps.description: Implement test factories for real adapter injection using ADR-014's dependency injection pattern
steps.done_condition: Test factories inject real adapters into use cases

steps.description: Write integration tests for core F1 use cases covering data flow from input port to output port
steps.done_condition: All F1 use cases pass end-to-end validation

riskRegister.mitigation: Implement retry logic and container health checks
riskRegister.risk: Flaky tests due to unstable test containers
